description_long: This is a heavy-duty sledgehammer featuring a robust, rectangular steel head with slightly beveled edges and a flat striking face on both ends. The head is solid and dark-colored, showing a matte finish with some subtle surface texture. The handle is made of light-colored wood, straight and cylindrical, with a black rubberized grip covering the lower portion for enhanced handling and shock absorption. The transition between the head and handle is seamless, with the handle securely fitted into the head. The overall design is utilitarian, built for delivering powerful blows in construction, demolition, or urban maintenance tasks.
description: A sturdy sledgehammer with a solid steel head and a straight wooden handle featuring a black rubber grip. Built for heavy-duty striking tasks in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad, flat face of the sledgehammer head and the cylindrical handle extending backward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the handle, the rectangular profile of the head, and the black rubber grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the handle and the back face of the hammer head, with the grip clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handle's length, the head's rectangular shape, and the grip from a mirrored perspective.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a black rubberized ergonomic grip covering the lower portion; the handle is cylindrical and smooth with a slight taper toward the end.
attribute_head_type: Rectangular sledgehammer head made of steel, featuring two flat striking faces and slightly beveled edges; no claws or peens present.
